rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes using only visible feature names and provided numeric bounds.
generic_rules: Use boolean helper expressions to encapsulate range checks for clarity and type safety.
Ensure all variables in AGREE contracts are drawn from visible model features or explicitly declared in scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Define range conditions as boolean equations: var >= min and var <= max;
End AGREE annex blocks with '};' and ensure syntactic closure before closing component scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts without intermediate port mapping or variable declaration.
